category_sources: source_facts.description states Image Processing & Computer Vision library written in C; official Camellia page describes an image processing and computer vision C library.
display_name_sources: Official homepage identifies the project as the Camellia Library; source_facts.name is camellia.
docs_sources: Official Camellia homepage links to Doxygen documentation and states examples of use are provided.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; the official SourceForge project exposes a Code section for project source control, but current browsing surfaces mostly describe releases and legacy code hosting.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies image processing and computer vision in C; official homepage lists OpenCV interoperability and Doxygen documentation.
